The expectations which every disabled person has

49. The principle contains an aspiration to meet the 
needs of the class of persons facing a particular 
disability. Going beyond the needs of the class, 
the specific requirement of individuals who belong 
to the class must also be accommodated. The 
principle of reasonable accommodation must

discrimination is intersectional in nature. The 
intersectional features arise in particular contexts due
